title.en: This place is really fog-free sea.

content.en:
There is too much difference between having an immeasurable body secret technique and not having an immeasurable body secret art, and Ye Tian naturally hopes that he has a more powerful combat power.

And Ye Tian learned that in the True Mountain Territory, there was a place where there was an immeasurable body secret technique.

This place is really fog-free sea.

The True Infinite Sea was once the territory of a middle-level immeasurable lifeform, and that middle-level immeasurable lifeform was called Youhe Great Ancestor.

This Youhe Great Ancestor is very demonic, and he once fought with a high-level immeasurable life form with a middle-level immeasurable life form without falling behind.

It's just that a long time ago, this Youhe Great Ancestor encountered a fatal crisis, dragging his remnants back to the True Fogless Sea, and the endless years have passed without recovering from his injuries, but getting more and more serious.

Before he died, this Youhe Great Ancestor put many of his legacies in the True Fogless Sea to repay the beings of the True Mountain Territory.

No matter what race you are, you can enter the True Fogless Sea.

Even those Dao Ancestors can enter here, as long as they are demonic enough, they can get certain benefits.

Similarly, if an immeasurable lifeform enters, it can also obtain certain resources.

It's just that for a long time, one immeasurable lifeform after another has entered the True Infinite Mist Sea, resulting in fewer and fewer precious resources left by the Great Ancestor of Youhe, and the resources useful for immeasurable lifeforms are even closer to nothing.

However, the Infinite Body Secret Technique still exists, and this Infinite Body Secret Technique is not something that can only be passed down by one person, but can be engraved again and again.

It's just that if there are too many inscriptions, the immeasurable body secret art inheritance will disappear.

At present, the Infinite Body Secret Technique still exists.

......

It's really a fog-free sea.

It is located in the southwestern part of the Yama Territory.

Soon, Ye Tian came here.

"It is difficult for immeasurable wills to penetrate how far away, curious places!"

Ye Tian said with slight surprise.

In the Silent Black Sea, there is hardly a place where the immeasurable will of a primary-level immeasurable lifeform can be suppressed in such a way, not to mention that his immeasurable will surpasses that of an ordinary primary-level immeasurable lifeform.

Even so, his immeasurable will was still severely suppressed.

Wow!

Ye Tian entered the True Fogless Sea without the slightest hesitation.

As soon as you enter the True Fogless Sea, the fog around you seems to have turned into a special force, and the more you resist, the slower your movements will be.

That is, the slower the flight here, the less suppressed it is.

If you want to travel through time and space here, you are afraid that you will be suppressed and crushed in an instant.

"According to the intelligence, the inheritance left by the Great Ancestor of Youhe is located in the core area of the True Fogless Sea, where there is a True Fogless Tower. "

Ye Tian immediately went to the True Fogless Tower.

Not long after, a magnificent fog tower appeared in Ye Tian's perception, and he stood directly in front of the True Fogless Tower.

This True Fogless Tower takes the origin of the entire True Fogless Sea as its core energy, and if you want to break the True Fogless Tower, you can't do it without the strength of a high-level immeasurable lifeform.

The True Fogless Tower also has a machine spirit to manage this fog tower, and as soon as Ye Tian entered the True Fogless Tower, he saw this machine spirit.

"Respected Great Ancestor, this is the first time you have entered the True Fogless Tower, and you only need to pass an assessment to obtain the reward left by your master. "

The True Fogless Tower Spirit said respectfully.

"Then let's take the test!"

Ye Tian said casually.

"Respected Great Ancestor, please follow me!"

The machine spirit brought Ye Tian into a magnificent hall, and soon an ancient stone tablet appeared.

"This is one of the tablets left by the master, you need to comprehend this ancient stele within the first year of the thousand realms, and decompose the thousand secret techniques on the stele. At the very least, it has to be broken down into nine hundred and ninety-nine kinds, and if there is less than one, it will be considered a failure!"

The machine spirit said.

"Dismantle the Mystic!"

Ye Tian was a little curious about this kind of assessment, it was the first time he had encountered this kind of assessment.

Later, he was here to contemplate this ancient stone tablet.

Soon, he understood the mystery of this ancient stone tablet.

A thousand secret techniques here are fused together in a special way, and each secret technique is the application and combination of the immeasurable path, and the combination of many secret techniques looks extremely chaotic.

It is not difficult to analyze hundreds of secret techniques from this stone tablet, but once one is wrong, it will inevitably be wrong later.

If you want to solve a thousand secret techniques, you must not make any mistakes.

Therefore, such an assessment is very difficult.

This is not only a test of the application and understanding of the immeasurable path, but also a test of understanding.

On the whole, there are no shortcomings, and there is hope to analyze a thousand secret techniques.

Fortunately, there is still plenty of time, a full thousand realms of the first year, so there is a chance of trial and error.

The first year of the realm is the unit of time for the Xuanqi realm, and the first year of the first realm is equivalent to 100 million years of the original domain era.

Therefore, the first year of the 1,000th Realm is equivalent to 100 billion years of the Primordial Era.

It's been a long time.

"In terms of understanding, I'm not worried at all, this kind of assessment is not difficult for me!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

Subsequently, he began to deduce and analyze again and again.

One secret technique after another was parsed by him, and for the first time, only nine hundred and eighty-six secret techniques were analyzed, and the rest could not be resolved.

This is clearly wrong.

So, he began to make a second attempt, which led to the analysis of ninety-ninety-two secret techniques.

Subsequently, he began the third analysis.

Time passed slowly, and after trying again and again, Ye Tian finally analyzed nine hundred and ninety-nine secret techniques.

But there was still plenty of time, so he didn't choose to submit the assessment, but continued to analyze.

In the end, it only took Ye Tian the first year of the Eighty-Six Realms to successfully analyze a thousand secret techniques.

"Machine spirit, I've parsed it out!"

Immediately, Ye Tian handed over a thousand secret techniques to the machine spirit.

After reading it, the machine spirit said, "Dear Great Ancestor, congratulations on your successful assessment. Since the resource rewards for immeasurable lifeforms are exhausted, you can choose other resources that are one of the next level, or you can choose the immeasurable body secret art!"

"I choose the Infinite Body Secret Technique!"

Ye Tian said.

"Okay!" Ji Ling said: "The True Fogless Tower has a total of six immeasurable body secret techniques, one of which is a superior immeasurable body secret technique, three middle multiplication immeasurable body secret techniques and two lower multiplication immeasurable body secret techniques, this is an introduction to the six immeasurable body secret arts, you can take a look." "

Wow!

Six immeasurable body secret techniques were presented in front of Ye Tian, allowing him to choose one.

Ye Tian took a look, among them, the superior immeasurable body secret technique was the best, but it was the most difficult to cultivate, while the inferior immeasurable body secret technique was relatively easy to practice.

If it is other primary-level immeasurable lifeforms, it is not necessary to choose the superior immeasurable body secret art, because if you can't practice it, it is a waste secret art, and it is useless.

Therefore, they prefer to choose the Inferior Immeasurable Body Secret Technique that suits them.

But Ye Tian didn't hesitate at all, and directly chose this superior immeasurable body secret technique!
